en: Thus says the LORD:"Keep justice, and do righteousness, for soon my salvation will come, and my deliverance be revealed.
zh: 耶和華這樣說： “你們要持守公平，實行公義； 因為我的拯救快要來到， 我的公義快要顯現了。

en: Blessed is the man who does this, and the son of man who holds it fast, who keeps the Sabbath, not profaning it, and keeps his hand from doing any evil."
zh: 謹守安息日，不褻瀆這日， 保守自己的手不作任何惡事， 這樣行的人和堅持這樣作的人， 是有福的！”

en: Let not the foreigner who has joined himself to the LORD say, "The LORD will surely separate me from his people"; and let not the eunuch say, "Behold, I am a dry tree."
zh: 與耶和華聯合的外族人不要說： “耶和華必把我從他的子民中分別出來。” 被閹割了的人也不要說：“看哪！我是一棵枯樹。”

en: For thus says the LORD: "To the eunuchs who keep my Sabbaths, who choose the things that please me and hold fast my covenant,
zh: 因為耶和華這樣說： “那些謹守我的安息日， 揀選我所喜悅的事， 持守我的約、被閹割了的人，

en: I will give in my house and within my walls a monument and a name better than sons and daughters; I will give them an everlasting name that shall not be cut off.
zh: 在我的殿中和在我的牆內，我要賜給他們有記念，有名號， 比有兒女更好； 我必賜給他們永遠不能廢掉的名。

en: "And the foreigners who join themselves to the LORD, to minister to him, to love the name of the LORD, and to be his servants, everyone who keeps the Sabbath and does not profane it, and holds fast my covenant-
zh: 至於那些與耶和華聯合的外族人， 為要事奉他，愛耶和華的名， 作他的僕人的，就是謹守安息日，不褻瀆這日， 又持守我的約的，

en: these I will bring to my holy mountain, and make them joyful in my house of prayer; their burnt offerings and their sacrifices will be accepted on my altar; for my house shall be called a house of prayer for all peoples."
zh: 我必領他們到我的聖山， 使他們在屬於我的禱告的殿中喜樂； 他們的燔祭和祭品，在我的祭壇上必蒙悅納； 因為我的殿必稱為萬族禱告的殿。”

en: The Lord GOD, who gathers the outcasts of Israel, declares, "I will gather yet others to him besides those already gathered."
zh: 主耶和華，就是招聚以色列被趕散的人的，說： “在以色列這些已經被招聚的人以外，我還要招聚別的人歸給他們。”

en: All you beasts of the field, come to devour- all you beasts in the forest.
zh: 田野的百獸啊！你們都來吃吧。 林中的百獸啊！你們都要這樣。

en: His watchmen are blind; they are all without knowledge; they are all silent dogs; they cannot bark, dreaming, lying down, loving to slumber.
zh: 他的守望者都是瞎眼的， 都沒有知識； 他們都是啞巴狗，不能吠； 只會作夢、躺臥，貪愛睡覺。

en: The dogs have a mighty appetite; they never have enough. But they are shepherds who have no understanding; they have all turned to their own way, each to his own gain, one and all.
zh: 這些狗十分貪吃，不知飽足； 他們是牧人，但甚麼都不明白； 他們都偏行自己的道路， 各從各方求自己的利益。

en: "Come," they say, "let me get wine; let us fill ourselves with strong drink; and tomorrow will be like this day, great beyond measure."
zh: 他們說：“來吧！我去拿酒，讓我們痛飲烈酒吧！ 明天必像今天一樣，而且比今天還盛大和豐盈。”
